address_book.delete_confirm_body: Susa leli kheli ebhukwini lakho lamakheli?
address_book.saved_unverified_body: Ikheli ligciniwe. I-EasyPost ayikwazanga ukuliqinisekisa, ngakho-ke qinisekisa imininingwane ngaphambi kokuthumela.
address_book.title: Ibhuku lamakheli
batch_shipments.confirm_buy_body: Thenga amalebula okuthumela kuwo wonke amaphakethe avumelekile kule batch.
batch_shipments.title: Izimpahla ze-batch
claims.description: Faka isicelo ngokumelene nokumbozwa komshwalense wempahla ethunyelwe elahlekile, elimele, noma ebiwe.
claims.title: Izicelo
connect_agents.allow_spending_label: Vumela abameli bacele ukuthenga (imvume yakho isadingeka)
connect_agents.approvals_intro: Ukuthenga okuceliwe umeli. Akukho okuthengiwe okwamanje. Imininingwane ivela ku-EasyPost, hhayi kumeli.
connect_agents.clients_intro: Lawa maklayenti e-MCP atholakele kule khompyutha. Ukuxhuma kwengeza okufakiwe kufayela lawo lokucushwa; ifayela elikhona liyagcinwa kuqala futhi akukho okunye okushintshayo.
connect_agents.confirm_spend_body:
Thenga i-{carrier} ngo-{amount} {currency} kumodi ye-{mode}?

Lokhu kuchitha imali yangempela uma imodi yokukhiqiza isebenza.
connect_agents.manual_intro: Kunoma yiliphi iklayenti elingabhalwanga ngenhla, engeza lokhu ekucushweni kwalo kwe-MCP. Amaningi asebenzisa u-“mcpServers”; i-VS Code isebenzisa u-“servers”.
connect_agents.no_clients: Awekho amaklayenti e-MCP atholakele. Sebenzisa ukusetha ngesandla okungezansi.
connect_agents.safety_explainer: Abameli bangafunda idatha yakho, baqinisekise amakheli futhi baqhathanise amanani ngaphandle kokubuza. Abasoze bakwazi ukuthenga ngqo: ukuthenga kuba yisicelo osivumela lapha, futhi imininingwane ithathwa ku-EasyPost, hhayi kulokho okushiwo umeli. Noma yini engaphezu kwale mikhawulo iyenqatshwa esikhundleni sokulethwa ukuze igunyazwe. Faka u-0 ukususa umkhawulo.
connect_agents.title: Xhuma abameli be-AI
connect_agents.unsupported_body: Ukuxhuma abameli be-AI nge-MCP okwamanje kusekelwa kuphela kunguqulo elandwa ngqo ye-Easy-Post Desktop. Kudinga ukuthi olunye uhlelo lokusebenza luqale inqubo yosizo kulokhu kufakwa futhi lubhale kumafayela okucushwa awamanye amahlelo, futhi iphakethe le-Microsoft Store ayikwazi ukwenza kokubili ngokwethembekile.
connect_agents.unsupported_link: Inguqulo elandwa ngqo iyatholakala ku-easy-post.spencerfields.com. Konke okunye kusebenza ngendlela efanayo kuzo zombili izinguqulo.
connect_agents.verified_note: Le mininingwane ilandwe kabusha ku-EasyPost kusetshenziswa kuphela izinkomba ezinikezwe umeli. Uma lokhu kungeyona obukulindele, yenqaba.
create_shipment.buy_needs_full_address: Shintshela ku-“Amakheli aphelele” ukuze uthenge le ntengo.
create_shipment.customs_hts_hint: Udinga ikhodi yentela? Sebenzisa ikhasi lokubheka Ikhodi ye-HTS.
create_shipment.customs_intro: Izinkampani ezithuthayo ziyayenqaba ukuthengwa kwelebula uma kungekho imininingwane ephelele ye-Customs kunoma yimuphi umthwalo odlula umngcele wamazwe ngamazwe.
create_shipment.customs_validation_body: Le mpahla ethunyelwe idlula umngcele wamazwe ngamazwe. Qedela ingxenye ye-Customs kuqala: uhlobo lwesiqukathi, igama losayina, isiqinisekiso, kanye nento eyodwa ye-Customs okungenani enencazelo, inani, inani lemali, isisindo, nezwe lomsuka.
create_shipment.delete_package_confirm_b: Susa iphakethe elilondoloziwe '{name}'? Lokhu ngeke kubuyiselwe.
create_shipment.missing_addresses_body: Qinisekisa okungenani amakheli amabili ebhukwini lamakheli kuqala.
create_shipment.missing_name_body: Le mpahla ethunyelwe idlula umngcele wamazwe ngamazwe. Izinkampani ezithuthayo zidinga igama noma inkampani kokubili ekhelini lomsuka nasekhelini elizoyiswa kulo ukuze kwenziwe isimemezelo se-Customs — engeza eyodwa kwelinye nelinye ebhukwini lamakheli kuqala.
create_shipment.missing_phone_body: Le mpahla ethunyelwe idlula umngcele wamazwe ngamazwe. Izinkampani ezithuthayo zidinga inombolo yocingo kokubili ekhelini lomsuka nasekhelini elizoyiswa kulo — engeza eyodwa kwelinye nelinye ebhukwini lamakheli kuqala.
create_shipment.missing_zip_body: Faka ikhodi yeposi yalapho kuthunyelwa khona nalapho kuthunyelwe kusuka khona.
create_shipment.no_rates_body: I-EasyPost ayibuyiselanga amanani ale mpahla ethunyelwe.
create_shipment.preview_failed: Isithombe selebula asikwazanga ukulayishwa. Sebenzisa izinkinobho ezingezansi ukulivula noma ukuligcina.
create_shipment.preview_unavailable: Leli lebula liyi-PDF futhi alikwazi ukuboniswa lapha. Sebenzisa izinkinobho ezingezansi ukulivula noma ukuligcina.
create_shipment.purchased_no_label: Kuthengiwe, kodwa akukho URL yelebula ebuyisiwe.
create_shipment.save_package_dialog_labe: Nika leli phakethe igama ukuze uliqale futhi kamuva:
create_shipment.title: Dala impahla ethunyelwe & amanani okuthenga
create_shipment.zip_mode_note: Ukuhlola intengo kuphela. Ukuthenga ilebula kudinga amakheli aphelele emaceleni omabili, ngakho shintshela ku-“Amakheli aphelele” ukuze uthenge.
dashboard.placeholder_text: Izimpahla ezithunyelwe, ukulandelela, ibhuku lamakheli, nemibono yemibiko kuyongezwa ezigabeni zokwakhiwa ezizayo. Sebenzisa Izilungiselelo ukuphatha amakhiya e-API.
dashboard.title: Ideshibhodi
donation_banner.message: Uma i-EasyPost Desktop iwusizo kuwe, cabangela ukusekela ukuthuthukiswa kwayo.
history.confirm_insure_purchase: Thenga ukumbozwa komshwalense we-{amount} kule mpahla ethunyelwe.
history.confirm_refund_request: Cela imali ebuyiselwe yelebula yale mpahla ethunyelwe.
history.refund_submitted_body: Imali ebuyiselwe iceliwe. Inkampani ethuthayo izoqinisekisa ngokungahambisani ngesikhathi — sebenzisa 'Hlola isimo semali ebuyiselwe' ukubheka umphumela wokugcina.
history.title: Umlando wezimpahla
hts_lookup.intro: Bheka amakhodi e-Harmonized Tariff Schedule (HTS) awasetshenziswa ekumenyezelweni kwe-Customs, usebenzisa idatha yangesikhathi sangempela evela ku-U.S. International Trade Commission. Lokhu kuwulwazi lwesikhombo kuphela, hhayi izeluleko ze-Customs noma zomthetho — ukuhlelwa okufanele kwempahla yakho ethunyelwe kungumthwalo wakho wedwa.
hts_lookup.search_placeholder: Sesha ngegama eliphambili (isb. 'ucingo lwethusi') noma inombolo ye-HTS
hts_lookup.status_idle: Faka igama eliphambili noma inombolo ye-HTS ukuze usesha.
hts_lookup.status_live: Idatha yangesikhathi sangempela evela ku-U.S. International Trade Commission.
hts_lookup.status_offline_cache: Ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi — kubonisa imiphumela egcinwe ngaphambilini, okungenzeka ingabi ngeyakamuva.
hts_lookup.status_searching: Isesha kudathabhesi ye-U.S. International Trade Commission…
hts_lookup.title: Ukubheka Ikhodi ye-HTS
insurance.intro_text: Kwizimpahla ezithengwe ngalolu hlelo lokusebenza, sebenzisa inkinobho yokuFaka umshwalense ku-Umlando esikhundleni salokhu. Sebenzisa le fomu kuphela kumalebula athengwe ngaphandle kwe-EasyPost osafuna ukuwafakela umshwalense.
insurance.missing_info_body: Ikhodi yokulandelela, inkampani ethuthayo, nenani kuyadingeka.
insurance.title: Faka umshwalense empahleni ethunyelwe
license_gate.buy_soon_body: Ukuthenga ku-inthanethi akukatholakali okwamanje. Sicela uphinde uhlole maduzane.
license_gate.invalid_body: Lowo khiye welayisensi awutholakalanga. Qiniseka ukuthi ukopishe wonke ukhiye ku-imeyili yakho yokuthenga, noma uxhumane nabasekelayo.
license_gate.offline_body: Ukhiye wakho uvumelekile, ngakho ungaqhubeka. Inani lamakhompyutha alikwazanga ukuqinisekiswa okwamanje; sizozama futhi ngokuzenzakalelayo. Uma kufika {date} kungakafinyeleleki, uzocelwa ukuthi uvule kabusha.
license_gate.release_body: Ilayisense yakho ihlanganisa amakhompyutha angu-{seats} futhi wonke asetshenziswa. Khetha elilodwa ukuze likhululwe, lelicomputer lithathe indawo yalo. Ikhompyutha ekhululiwe izocelwa ukuthi ivule kabusha uma iqala okulandelayo.
license_gate.release_title: Leli layisense selikuwo wonke amakhompyutha alo
license_gate.subtitle: Faka ukhiye welayisensi owuthole nge-imeyili ngemva kokuthenga kwakho ukuze uvule uhlelo lokusebenza.
license_gate.title: Yenza kusebenze i-Easy-Post Desktop
mode_banner.production_label: ⚠ Imodi yokusebenza — ukuthenga kusebenzisa imali yangempela
mode_banner.test_label: Imodi yokuhlola — azikho izindleko zangempela zenkampani ethuthayo eziyokwenzeka
pickups.missing_info_body: Khetha ikheli nokungenani impahla eyodwa ethunyelwe.
pickups.no_rates_body: Ukulanda kudaliwe, kodwa azikho amanani enkampani ethuthayo abuyisiwe okuthenga.
pickups.title: Ukulanda impahla
purchase_confirm.warning_body:
Ukwimodi yokusebenza. {description}

Lokhu kuzoshaja i-akhawunti yakho ye-EasyPost imali yangempela. Qhubeka?
reports.title: Umlando & ukubika
settings.label_applies_note: Kusebenza emithwalweni emisha, kufaka phakathi neyamaqoqo. Abathwali banquma usayizi welebula ngesikhathi kudalwa umthwalo, ngakho lokhu akuwashintshi amalebula asethengiwe.
settings.label_caveat_ups: I-UPS ibuyisa u-4x7 ngaphandle uma kushintshiwe. U-4x6 usebenza ku-ZPL kuphela, ngaphandle uma i-EasyPost Support ivula u-4x6 PNG ku-akhawunti yakho (imithwalo yasekhaya kuphela). U-4x7 no-4x8 empeleni yilebula u-4x6 elinezikhala ezingenalutho.
settings.label_caveat_zpl_only: I-LaserShip ne-OnTrac zisekela u-4x6 no-4x8 ku-ZPL kuphela.
settings.language_restart_note: Qala kabusha uhlelo lokusebenza ukuze ushintsho lolimi lusebenze ngokugcwele.
settings.title: Izilungiselelo
settings.webhook_status_stopped: Ayisebenzi. Ukulandelela kusalungiswa nge-polling njalo ngemizuzu emi-5.
setup_wizard.key_required_body: Faka okungenani ikhiya le-API elilodwa (lokuhlola noma lokusebenza) ukuze uqhubeke.
setup_wizard.subtitle: Namathisela ikhiya/amakhiya akho e-EasyPost API ngezansi. Agcinwa ngokuphepha kusiphathimanejala samukelo lwesistimu yokusebenza kule mshini — awakaze abhalwe ngombhalo ovulekile, awakaze athunyelwe kwenye indawo ngaphandle kwe-API ye-EasyPost.
setup_wizard.title: Xhuma i-akhawunti yakho ye-EasyPost
tracking.title: Ukulandelela
